steps.title: Fit the charge model
steps.content: Use hours $h$ as $x$ and total charge $f(h)$ as $y$. The table gives $(1,155)$ and $(3,285)$, so run a linear regression.

steps.title: Read the equation
steps.content: Desmos gives $m=65$ and $b=90$, so $f(h)=65h+90$. The $90$ is the fixed charge, and $65$ is the hourly charge.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is $f(h)=65h+90$, so C is correct.
